tools.purpose: Copy the built dashboard bundle into the server static output during the server build.

inputs.name: dashboard_dist
inputs.description: Built dashboard assets produced before the server packaging step.

inputs.name: server_static_output
inputs.description: Target directory recreated on each run before files are copied.

outputs.description: Fresh static asset copy used by the packaged server.

side_effects: Removes and recreates packages/server/dist/static before copying files.

related_rules.description: The copied assets are served by the Fabric HTTP server.
The server build pipeline invokes this script after tsup.

update_when: copy semantics or side effects change
maintenance.change_log_expectation: Update this manifest entry in the same change that alters the script contract.

tools.purpose: Validate bootstrap and skill templates against protected English tokens, hard-rule wording, and leading fab:rule-id headers.

inputs.name: bootstrap_templates
inputs.description: Bootstrap template files that must preserve protected protocol tokens.

inputs.name: claude_skill_templates
inputs.description: Skill templates that must keep English hard-rule sections stable.

inputs.name: protected_token_registry
inputs.description: Registry of tokens that must not drift across localized surfaces.

outputs.description: Lists validation violations and exits non-zero when the template contract is broken.

side_effects: No repository writes; process exit code becomes the quality gate signal.

related_rules.description: The script enforces the registry used by localized copy and template validation.
The quality gate protects the leading fab:rule-id header contract.

update_when: header validation or failure semantics change
maintenance.change_log_expectation: Update this manifest entry whenever the lint contract or enforced token set changes.
